comment.body: The upper line is a strong resistance zone after 1 pm, can be broken only if volatility declines steeply, but overall the vol crush is suppressive in this regime. If vol catches up, spot is pushed upward even towards 6085 (because negative vanna makes dealers shorter delta if vol catches up).

comment.body: I’d be cautious of rationalizing too much about what should happen. It’s one piece of data and doesn’t take into account the current regime, momentum, or focus of the market. What we see as negative data can be interpreted positively and vice versa. When you are rationalizing you are starting to grasp at straws. That can be a big proceed with caution signal for yourself.
